provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, broad muscular female reptilian alien with dark grey-green scales and enormous scarred forearms from rivet work, a prominent crest ridge with protective goggles pushed up on it, amber eyes squinting from years of welding, a thick powerful tail used for balance on scaffolding, wearing a heavy canvas work apron over leather coveralls with hull-plating burn marks, thick welding gauntlets hanging from belt clips, magnetic boots for working on ship hulls, she builds warships and her craft is honored as highly as fighting
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

judgment.explanation: On-style gritty space costume. Faction-appropriate material vocabulary and wear level. Reads as a working person in a spacefaring civilization.
